CustomField.formula: NOT( OR( ISBLANK(Name), ISBLANK(AccountId), ISBLANK(TEXT(StageName)), ISBLANK(TEXT(OrderExpectation__c)), ISBLANK(Region__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(BU__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(SBU__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Plant__c)), ISBLANK(CloseDate), ISBLANK(ScheduledSalesDate__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(NeedConstruction__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(KOUJI_SYU__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(UKE_KBN__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(ConstructionDistinction__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Handling__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(DemandOf__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(DemanDepartment__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(ExportCategory__c)) ) )
CustomField.label: 必須項目入力フラグ
